newsletters.title: Want to join us in Brooklyn?
newsletters.content:
вЂ‹

( https://0ab9ee3d.click.kit-mail3.com/xmu6zrxe6wf6hp520zxt5h2eo56r3unh8lr4l/kkhmh6hn0vlwwvclh7/aHR0cHM6Ly9ldmVyeS50bw== )

Our July IRL meetup is for paid Every subscribers.
Hi there,

We're bringing the Every community together outside for another summer evening in the backyard of our Brooklyn brownstone.

It'll be a casual hang with readers, writers, founders, operators, and creative people thinking seriously about AI, work, ideas, and what they're building next.

Every IRLвЂ”July 2026
Wednesday, July 15
6вЂ“8 p.m. ET
Brooklyn, NY

This event is for paid subscribers. Upgrade to request a spot.

Subscribe and RSVP ( https://0ab9ee3d.click.kit-mail3.com/xmu6zrxe6wf6hp520zxt5h2eo56r3unh8lr4l/58hvh7hgd2mxx8u6h4/aHR0cHM6Ly9sdW1hLmNvbS9oc2t6ejJiMQ== )

Hope to see you outside,
The Every team

newsletters.title: Welcome to Efficiencymaxxing
newsletters.content:
Plus: Why intent beats volume, a new AI productivity status metric, and a tool for squeezing the most out of cheaper models В вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊ
https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiV2VsY29tZSB0byBFZmZpY2llbmN5bWF4eGluZyIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQzMzEsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2V2ZXJ5LnRvLyIsInBvc2l0aW9uIjowfQ==

Context Window

https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiV2VsY29tZSB0byBFZmZpY2llbmN5bWF4eGluZyIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQzMzEsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2V2ZXJ5LnRvL2NvbnRleHQtd2luZG93IiwicG9zaXRpb24iOjF9


WELCOME TO EFFICIENCYMAXXING https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiV2VsY29tZSB0byBFZmZpY2llbmN5bWF4eGluZyIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQzMzEsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2V2ZXJ5LnRvL2NvbnRleHQtd2luZG93L3dlbGNvbWUtdG8tZWZmaWNpZW5jeW1heHhpbmciLCJwb3NpdGlvbiI6Mn0=


PLUS: WHY INTENT BEATS VOLUME, A NEW AI PRODUCTIVITY STATUS METRIC, AND A TOOL FOR SQUEEZING THE MOST OUT OF CHEAPER MODELS https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiV2VsY29tZSB0byBFZmZpY2llbmN5bWF4eGluZyIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQzMzEsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2V2ZXJ5LnRvL2NvbnRleHQtd2luZG93L3dlbGNvbWUtdG8tZWZmaWNpZW5jeW1heHhpbmciLCJwb3NpdGlvbiI6M30=

by Laura Entis https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiV2VsY29tZSB0byBFZmZpY2llbmN5bWF4eGluZyIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQzMzEsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2V2ZXJ5LnRvL0BsYXVyYV8yN2JiYWZfMSIsInBvc2l0aW9uIjo0fQ==

https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiV2VsY29tZSB0byBFZmZpY2llbmN5bWF4eGluZyIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQzMzEsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL3d3dy55b3V0dWJlLmNvbS93YXRjaD92PTdORDBsUW1MSmxBIiwicG9zaXRpb24iOjV9 Midjourney/Every illustration.

For a brief period, AI was an affordable novelty. Every use case felt like magic, and even the silliest task was worth a try when frontier labs were subsidizing compute costs to get consumers hooked. Power users proved their status by maxing out their token consumption https://every..

Now, AI is ubiquitousвЂ”even required in many workplacesвЂ”and easy to use for anything from code to text to visuals. But this flood of production has a price: in cash, as powerful new models https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiV2VsY29tZSB0byBFZmZpY2llbmN5bWF4eGluZyIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQzMzEsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2V2ZXJ5LnRvL2NoYWluLW9mLXRob3VnaHQvdGhlLW1vcmFsLW9mLWZhYmxlIiwicG9zaXRpb24iOjd9 grow more token-hungry https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiV2VsY29tZSB0byBFZmZpY2llbmN5bWF4eGluZyIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQzMzEsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2V2ZXJ5LnRvL2NvbnRleHQtd2luZG93L3Rva2VuLXRpZ2h0ZW5pbmciLCJwb3NpdGlvbiI6OH0= and the labs roll back those generous subsidies, but also in the time and effort required to make sense of the results. (If youвЂ™ve ever tried to debug an AI-generated codebase https://every., edit AI-generated text https://every., or decipher the meaning behind an AI-generated email https://every., you know how labor-intensive it can be to wade through poor-quality LLM outputs.)

Focus has evolved accordingly from how much youвЂ™re using AI to how youвЂ™re using itвЂ”and what you can show for it. Does the benefit justify the significant cost?

TodayвЂ™s Context Window explores various answers and solutions to that question. First up, author and technologist Craig Mod https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiV2VsY29tZSB0byBFZmZpY2llbmN5bWF4eGluZyIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQzMzEsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2NyYWlnbW9kLmNvbS8iLCJwb3NpdGlvbiI6MTJ9 explains why cheap software creation has made him more protective of his writing time; Monologue https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiV2VsY29tZSB0byBFZmZpY2llbmN5bWF4eGluZyIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQzMzEsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL3d3dy5tb25vbG9ndWUudG8vP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZXZlcnl3ZWJzaXRlIiwicG9zaXRpb24iOjEzfQ== general manager Naveen Naidu https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiV2VsY29tZSB0byBFZmZpY2llbmN5bWF4eGluZyIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQzMzEsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2V2ZXJ5LnRvL0BuYXZlZW5fNjgwNCIsInBvc2l0aW9uIjoxNH0= shares a new efficiency metric he heard making the rounds in San Francisco; senior applied AI engineer Nityesh Agarwal https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiV2VsY29tZSB0byBFZmZpY2llbmN5bWF4eGluZyIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQzMzEsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2V2ZXJ5LnRvL0BuaXR5ZXNoIiwicG9zaXRpb24iOjE1fQ== shows us how he audits agents for wasted tokens; and Spiral https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiV2VsY29tZSB0byBFZmZpY2llbmN5bWF4eGluZyIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQzMzEsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL3dyaXRld2l0aHNwaXJhbC5jb20vP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZXZlcnl3ZWJzaXRlIiwicG9zaXRpb24iOjE2fQ== general manager Marcus Moretti https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiV2VsY29tZSB0byBFZmZpY2llbmN5bWF4eGluZyIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQzMzEsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2V2ZXJ5LnRvL0BtYXJjdXNfZmQ4MzAyXzEiLCJwb3NpdGlvbiI6MTd9 explains how OpenRouter helps him manage a 12-plus-model stack.

Was this newsletter forwarded to you? Sign up https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiV2VsY29tZSB0byBFZmZpY2llbmN5bWF4eGluZyIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQzMzEsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2V2ZXJ5LnRvL2FjY291bnQiLCJwb3NpdGlvbiI6MTh9 to get it in your inbox.

https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b

newsletters.title: OpenAI's next AI models arrive tomorrow
newsletters.content:
~[Sign up](https://www.theaivalley.com/)~~ | ~~[Follow us on X](https://twitter.com/heyBarsee)~~ | ~~[Sponsor](mailto:barsee@aivalley.ai)~

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/c167fb98-39eb-42d4-a114-56fe02753cac/2__1_-min__2_-min.png?t=1744033912)
Follow image link: (https://www.theaivalley.com/subscribe)
Caption: 

Together with

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/aea95350-8e6d-4354-8d20-42739a2c0278/Katalyze_Ink_Logo__2___2_.png?t=1783522657)
Follow image link: (https://katalyzeai.com/?utm_source=ai+valley&utm_medium=nl&utm_campaign=launch)
Caption: 



----------
howdy, itвЂ™s Barsee again.

happy wednesday, AI family, and welcome back to AI Valley.

**here are the biggest things worth knowing today:**

* OpenAI's next AI models arrive tomorrow

* Grok 4.5 could be xAI's biggest launch yet

* Meta is taking on AI image generation

* China may tighten control over frontier AI

* Plus trending AI tools, posts, and resources

LetвЂ™s _dive_ into the Valley of AIвЂ¦


----------

----------
#### **KATALYZE**

## [The agentic infrastructure five of the top twenty pharma companies already run](https://katalyzeai.com/?utm_source=ai+valley&utm_medium=nl&utm_campaign=launch)

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/291db045-45c0-4613-88ed-fbff8d5a3f68/founders_copy__2_.jpg?t=1783522646)
Follow image link: (https://katalyzeai.com/?utm_source=ai+valley&utm_medium=nl&utm_campaign=launch)
Caption: Courtesy: Katalyze

In regulated pharma manufacturing, the work between a molecule and a finished medicine still moves by hand. Deviation investigations drag on for weeks. Scientists lose days to fragmented systems instead of advancing the science. 

Katalyze raised 10.5M to deploy agentic infrastructure across that regulated middle. It connects the systems you already run, grounds everything in your own data, and puts expert-designed agents on the difficult work - finding root cause, catching process faults, and drafting regulatory-ready reports. 

Teams see plant throughput up 25%, batch release 40% faster, and investigations that once took months close in 45 minutes. It already runs at sites inside five of the top twenty global pharma companies, helping deliver over 10 million doses in just two years. Every answer is traceable to its source, built for the world's most regulated environments. 

[See how it works.](https://katalyzeai.com/?utm_source=ai+valley&utm_medium=nl&utm_campaign=launch)

~_*This is sponsored_~


----------

----------
#### **THROUGH THE VALLEY**

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/6ba1bc3a-33b4-4f93-8e4f-8bb9884ea43d/image_-_2026-07-08T203131.509__1_.png?t=1783522636)
Caption: Courtesy: OpenAI

**1/ OpenAI's next generation of AI models arrives tomorrow: **The company announced that GPT-5.6 Sol, Terra, and Luna will become [publicly available](https://x.com/OpenAI/status/2074704958419792299?s=20) on Thursday following approval for a broad release. The new model family introduces improved performance, lower pricing tiers, and enhanced caching, positioning OpenAI to compete more aggressively with the latest frontier models from Anthropic, Google, and others.

**2/ SpaceX and Cursor are preparing to launch their first AI model together: **Grok 4.5 is expected to [debut today](https://threadreaderapp.com/thread/2074621759891132710.html), featuring a new V9 foundation model with roughly 1.5 trillion parameters, making it SpaceX's largest model to date. Early internal testing suggests it could compete with Anthropic's Opus 4.8 and OpenAI's GPT-5.5, though independent benchmark results have not yet been released.

**3/ Meta wants to compete with OpenAI and Midjourney on AI image generation:** The company unveiled [Muse Image](https://ai.meta.com/blog/introducing-muse-image-muse-video-msl), its first in-house image model from Superintelligence Labs, offering advanced image generation, editing, and agentic capabilities across Meta AI, Instagram, and WhatsApp. The model ranks second on Arena's image [leaderboard](https://arena.ai/leaderboard/text-to-image) behind OpenAI's GPT Image 2, with a Muse Video model already on the way.

**4/ Beijing considers new restrictions for Chinese AI:** Beijing is reportedly considering [restrictions](https://www.reuters.com/world/beijing-is-looking-curbing-overseas-access-chinas-top-ai-models-sources-say-2026-07-07) on how the country's most advanced AI models, including Alibaba's Qwen, ByteDance's Doubao, and Z.ai's GLM-5.2, can be accessed outside China. If implemented, the move would mirror recent U.S. export controls and make access to frontier AI increasingly shaped by geopolitics rather than technology.


----------

----------
# TRENDING TOOLS


--------------------
* [AnySearch](https://www.anysearch.com/home) > Search infrastructure that delivers filtered, deduplicated, and structured real-time data directly to AI agents

* [Claude Fable 5](https://x.com/claudeai/status/2074548242386178258?s=20) > Anthropic extends Fable 5 access through July 12 for all paid plan users

* [Seedream 5.0 Pro](https://x.com/synthwavedd/status/2074852061166903783?s=20) > Seemingly the first image model from any AI lab positioned to compete directly with GPT-Image 2


----------

----------
# WHAT I'M CONSUMING


--------------------
* The people who will [thrive](https://www.theatlantic.com/ideas/2026/06/ai-open-ai-anthropic/687689) in the AI age

* [Research shows](https://phys.org/news/2026-07-ai-real-people.html) people trust AI facesВ more than those of real people

* Claude Cowork on [mobile and web](https://claude.com/blog/cowork-web-mobile)


----------

----------
# THE VALLEY GEMS


--------------------
__WhatвЂ™s trending on social today:__

Tweet:  (https://twitter.com/vadi_ms/status/2074565404404703681?s=20)

вЂ”вЂ”вЂ”вЂ”вЂ”вЂ”вЂ”вЂ”вЂ”вЂ”вЂ”вЂ”вЂ”вЂ”вЂ”вЂ”вЂ”вЂ”вЂ”вЂ”вЂ”вЂ”вЂ”вЂ”вЂ”вЂ”вЂ”

Tweet:  (https://twitter.com/unusual_whales/status/2074820039073550453?s=20)


----------

----------
# THATвЂ™S ALL FOR TODAY


--------------------
Thank you for reading todayвЂ™s edition. ThatвЂ™s all for todayвЂ™s issue.

newsletters.title: Use Fable Before You Know What to Ask
newsletters.content:
Plus: A manual for handing recurring work to Opus, a skill for judging new tools in context, and the specialist model that beat the frontier for less В вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊ

https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiVXNlIEZhYmxlIEJlZm9yZSBZb3UgS25vdyBXaGF0IHRvIEFzayIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQzMzAsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2V2ZXJ5LnRvL2NvbnRleHQtd2luZG93IiwicG9zaXRpb24iOjF9


USE FABLE BEFORE YOU KNOW WHAT TO ASK https://every.


PLUS: A MANUAL FOR HANDING RECURRING WORK TO OPUS, A SKILL FOR JUDGING NEW TOOLS IN CONTEXT, AND THE SPECIALIST MODEL THAT BEAT THE FRONTIER FOR LESS https://every.

by Katie Parrott https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiVXNlIEZhYmxlIEJlZm9yZSBZb3UgS25vdyBXaGF0IHRvIEFzayIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQzMzAsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2V2ZXJ5LnRvL0BrYXRpZS5wYXJyb3R0MTIiLCJwb3NpdGlvbiI6NH0=

Midjourney/Every illustration.

Today, we explore why FableвЂ™s sharpest edge is its ability to surface the decisions you didnвЂ™t know you were making. Plus, EveryвЂ™s head of social media Becky Isjwara walks through how she had Fable diagnose and fix a task Opus 4.8 kept fumbling, and product leader Trevin Chow shares the /ce-pov skill, which forces an AIвЂ™s impressions of a new tool to survive contact with your projectвЂ™s constraints.

Was this newsletter forwarded to you? Sign up https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiVXNlIEZhYmxlIEJlZm9yZSBZb3UgS25vdyBXaGF0IHRvIEFzayIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQzMzAsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2V2ZXJ5LnRvL2FjY291bnQiLCJwb3NpdGlvbiI6NX0= to get it in your inbox.



----------------------------------------




SIGNAL

USE FABLE TO FIND YOUR UNKNOWNS

Today is the last day Fable 5 https://every. is included in the weekly limits for Claude Pro, Max, Team, and select Enterprise plans. Starting tomorrow, it moves to pay-as-you-go usage credits. At twice the price of its closest sibling, Opus 4.8 https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiVXNlIEZhYmxlIEJlZm9yZSBZb3UgS25vdyBXaGF0IHRvIEFzayIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQzMzAsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwOi8vZ29vZ2xlLmNvbS9zZWFyY2g_, the question is: When is ClaudeвЂ™s pricey mega-model worth calling in?

ItвЂ™s tempting to save Fable for the biggest, most heavy-duty jobs you have. But there are more ways to measure complexity than the size of the task. Some jobs are hard because they demand enormous execution against a settled plan. Others become hard when the model discovers that the goal, baseline, or standard was wrong from the start. A smaller model may handle the first surprisingly well. FableвЂ™s advantage becomes clearest in the second.

Anthropic member of technical staff Thariq Shihipar https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiVXNlIEZhYmxlIEJlZm9yZSBZb3UgS25vdyBXaGF0IHRvIEFzayIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQzMzAsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL3guY29tL3RycTIxMiIsInBvc2l0aW9uIjo4fQ== offers a way to recognize this second kind of difficulty before Fable spends time executing against the wrong premise. His field guide https://every. shows how to use the model to surface questions and decisions that the assignment leaves unresolved, both before execution and as the work unfolds.

He frames the problem as a gap between the map and the territory. The map is the prompt, skills, and context you give Claude. The territory is the codebase, the real world, and the constraints that each introduces. Thariq calls the gaps between them вЂњunknownsвЂќ: moments when Claude must make a decision without enough information to know what you would want. Picking up on a framework popularized by former United States Secretary of Defense Donald Rumsfeld, Shihipar differentiates between вЂњunknown knownsвЂќ and вЂњ https://every. unknowns.вЂќ https://every. An вЂњunknown knownвЂќ is a criterion so obvious to you that you would never think to write it down, though you would recognize it when you saw it. An вЂњunknown unknownвЂќ is a question you have not considered at allвЂ”which the model may encounter in the course of its work without a map to guide it.

EveryвЂ™s experience with Fable illustrates both kinds. Head of tech consulting Mike Taylor https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiVXNlIEZhYmxlIEJlZm9yZSBZb3UgS25vdyBXaGF0IHRvIEFzayIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQzMzAsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2V2ZXJ5LnRvL0BtaWtlXzIxMTQiLCJwb3NpdGlvbiI6MTJ9 gave Fable the completed manuscript of his book about the AI programming framework DSPy. His request had explicit boundaries: Read it and tell him what he had missed. Yet it posed an unknown known. Mike expected to recognize a major omission if Fable surfaced one, even though he

newsletters.content:

Caption: 

Together with

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/7f8d1c4d-a362-4145-974a-332de927a166/ggeg4g4g4g__1___1_.png?t=1782137995)
Follow image link: (https://ref.viktor.com/vik-aiv-main4)
Caption: 



----------
Howdy, itвЂ™s Barsee again.

Happy Wednesday, AI family, and welcome back to AI Valley.

**TodayвЂ™s climb through the Valley reveals:**

* Anthropic may have found AI's hidden "thinking" layer

* ElonвЂ™s xAI rebrands as SpaceXAI, unveils new logo

* AI adoption is accelerating hiring

* OpenAI might be preparing GPT-5.6 for next week's release

* Plus trending AI tools, posts, and resources

LetвЂ™s _dive_ into the Valley of AIвЂ¦


----------

----------
#### **VIKTOR**

## [Show Viktor once. It just does it.](https://ref.viktor.com/vik-aiv-main4)

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/4aa41500-120c-4412-a7c2-de509b822ea4/G8_3___A0004___GFT___Run_a_company_faster__easier__and_more_scalable.___Evergreen_TOFU___18.05.26___1200x628__5_.png?t=1783429345)
Caption: Courtesy: Viktor

Viktor is the AI employee that lives in your Slack and Teams.

Show it how you handle reorders. How you draft launch briefs. How AP approvals move through your team. What your standup notes look like. Viktor learns each workflow once and starts doing it for you.

By week three, finance, marketing, eng, and ops are all delegating to the same employee. The question stops being "can Viktor do this?" and becomes "what should we hand off next?"

3,000+ integrations. 15,000+ teams. SOC 2 certified.

$100 in credits, no card.

[Get started free в†’](https://ref.viktor.com/vik-aiv-main4)

~_*This is sponsored_~


----------

----------
#### **THROUGH THE VALLEY**

Youtube: WhatвЂ™s at the center of ClaudeвЂ™s mind? (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=rKV5JcALQoQ)

**1/ Anthropic may have discovered how AI "thinks" before it responds:** Researchers discovered that Claude spontaneously developed an internal "[global workspace](https://www.anthropic.com/research/global-workspace)," a structure similar to one of neuroscience's leading theories of conscious thought. The finding gives Anthropic a new way to inspect the model's hidden reasoning, monitor safety risks, and better understand how advanced AI systems think before they respond. ([see the video explainer](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=rKV5JcALQoQ))

**2/ ElonвЂ™s xAI rebrands as SpaceXAI, unveils new logo:** Elon Musk's AI company has officially rebranded from xAI to [SpaceXAI](https://www.businessinsider.com/xai-rebrand-spacexai-new-logo-x-handle-spacex-2026-7), completing its integration into SpaceX following the acquisition earlier this year. This move unifies the company's AI, social media, and space businesses under a single brand as it ramps up investments in AI infrastructure and large-scale compute.

**3/ AI adoption is accelerating hiring:** [A new study](https://ramp.com/data/ai-jobs-impact) of more than 21,000 U.S. companies found that businesses investing most heavily in AI increased their workforce by 10% over the past two years, while entry-level hiring rose 12%. The findings suggest AI is helping companies grow faster and create new roles rather than simply replacing existing jobs.

**4/ OpenAI might be preparing GPT-5.6 for next week's release: **[Reports](https://www.testingcatalog.com/openai-might-be-preparing-gpt-5-6-for-next-weeks-release) suggest GPT-5.6 could launch as early as next week, introducing new Sol, Terra, and Luna model tiers alongside a reasoning-effort slider and an "Ultra" mode for tackling more complex tasks. The release could further strengthen OpenAI's lead in coding and advanced reasoning as competition among frontier AI models continues to intensify.


----------

----------
# TRENDING TOOLS


--------------------
* [Hermes](https://hermes-agent.nousresearch.com/) > An AI agent that learns from every interaction and becomes more personalized over time

* [Cuey](https://cuey.io/compare) > Verify AI responses by instantly comparing answers from ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini side by side

* [FutureSearch](https://futuresearch.ai/) > A frontier AI model designed for forecasting and predicting future events, built on technology similar to ChatGPT and Claude

* [ZCode](https://venturebeat.com/technology/z-ai-launches-zcode-to-challenge-cursor-claude-code-and-github-copilot-in-ai-coding?utm_source=thedeepview&utm_medium=newsletter&utm_campaign=ai-adoption-leads-companies-to-hire-more-not-less) > China's Z.ai has launched a coding assistant built to compete with Cursor and Claude Code

* [Acti](https://openacti.com/) > An agentic mobile keyboard that lets you search, automate tasks, and execute commands from anywhere

* [Glaze by Raycast](https://www.glaze.app/) > Build native, offline Mac applications directly from natural language using AI

* [Context.dev](https://www.context.dev/) > A single API to scrape, enrich, and extract structured data from across the web


----------

----------
# WHAT I'M CONSUMING


--------------------

* The Robots Are [Here](https://www.chinatalk.media/p/the-robots-are-here)

* The Second Derivative: Why No One [Understands](https://www.groundbrkr.com/p/the-second-derivative-why-no-one) the AI Boom


----------

----------
# THE VALLEY GEMS


--------------------

----------

----------

--------------------
